scripts.build: npm run build:shared-chat && npm run build:prob && npm run build:kib && node scripts/assemble-site.js
scripts.build:shared-chat: cd packages/shared-chat && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.build:prob: mkdir -p apps/probabilistic/public/assets/shared-chat && cp packages/shared-chat/dist/widget.js apps/probabilistic/public/assets/shared-chat/widget.js && cd apps/probabilistic && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:kib: mkdir -p apps/kibuefx-landers/public/assets/shared-chat && cp packages/shared-chat/dist/widget.js apps/kibuefx-landers/public/assets/shared-chat/widget.js && cd apps/kibuefx-landers && npm install && npm run build
